revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Navbox |name = Imperial Waka Anthologies |title = [[Nijūichidaishū|Imperial Poetry Anthologies]] |listclass = hlist |group1 = Hachidaishū |list1 = * ''[[Kokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Gosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Goshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Kin'yō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shika Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Senzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shin Kokin Wakashū]]'' |group2 = Jūsandaishū |list2 = * ''[[Shinchokusen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokukokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokushūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Gyokuyō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokusenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Fūga Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinsenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinshokukokin Wakashū]]'' * |group3 = Related |list3 = * ''[[Shin'yō Wakashū]]'' }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japanese poetry navigational boxes]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Waka Anthologies |title = [[:en:Nijūichidaishū|Imperial Poetry Anthologies]] |listclass = hlist |group1 = Hachidaishū |list1 = * ''[[:en:Kokin Wakashū|Kokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gosen Wakashū|Gosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shūi Wakashū|Shūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Kin'yō Wakashū|Kin'yō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shika Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Senzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shin Kokin Wakashū]]'' |group2 = Jūsandaishū |list2 = * ''[[Shinchokusen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokukokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokushūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gyokuyō Wakashū|Gyokuyō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokusenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Fūga Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinsenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shinshokukokin Wakashū|Shinshokukokin Wakashū]]'' * |group3 = Related |list3 = * ''[[:en:Shin'yō Wakashū|Shin'yō Wakashū]]'' }}<noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Waka Anthologies |title = [[:en:Nijūichidaishū|Imperial Poetry Anthologies]] |listclass = hlist |group1 = Hachidaishū |list1 = * ''[[:en:Kokin Wakashū|Kokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gosen Wakashū|Gosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shūi Wakashū|Shūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Kin'yō Wakashū|Kin'yō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shika Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Senzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shin Kokin Wakashū]]'' |group2 = Jūsandaishū |list2 = * ''[[Shinchokusen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokukokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokushūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gyokuyō Wakashū|Gyokuyō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokusenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Fūga Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinsenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shinshokukokin Wakashū|Shinshokukokin Wakashū]]'' * |group3 = Related |list3 = * ''[[:en:Shin'yō Wakashū|Shin'yō Wakashū]]'' }}<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Imperial Waka Anthologies |title = [[:en:Nijūichidaishū|Imperial Poetry Anthologies]] |listclass = hlist |group1 = Hachidaishū |list1 = * ''[[:en:Kokin Wakashū|Kokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gosen Wakashū|Gosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shūi Wakashū|Shūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Kin'yō Wakashū|Kin'yō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shika Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Senzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shin Kokin Wakashū]]'' |group2 = Jūsandaishū |list2 = * ''[[Shinchokusen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokukokin Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokushūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingosen Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Gyokuyō Wakashū|Gyokuyō Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokusenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shokugoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Fūga Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinsenzai Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shinshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[Shingoshūi Wakashū]]'' * ''[[:en:Shinshokukokin Wakashū|Shinshokukokin Wakashū]]'' * |group3 = Related |list3 = * ''[[:en:Shin'yō Wakashū|Shin'yō Wakashū]]'' }}<noinclude>
